title: euphorbia angulata var. expansa
intro: Euphorbia angulata var. expansa, also known as the Angle Bush, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its latex, which has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Euphorbia angulata var. expansa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. Traditionally, the plant's latex is prepared into herbal remedies such as ointments, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
